activeCouponCode.title: Active Coupon Code
activeCouponCode.description: If the shared context packet shows the shopper holds an unredeemed coupon (activeCouponCode), pass it here so the engine does NOT stack a second discount.

activeCouponPercent.title: Active Coupon Percent
activeCouponPercent.description: The percent off of the shopper's existing unredeemed coupon, if known from the context packet.

avoidFlavored.title: Avoid Flavored
avoidFlavored.description: HARD filter. true = never recommend flavored coffee. Set true when the shopper dislikes flavored.

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: Use chat for the website concierge.

dislikeKeywordsCsv.title: Dislike Keywords
dislikeKeywordsCsv.description: Comma-separated words to never recommend by name, e.g. decaf,flavored. Build this from the shopper's saved dislikes.

email.title: Email
email.description: Optional. Leave blank for anonymous storefront recommendations; pass only when the shopper is signed in or voluntarily shared email.

excludeProductIdsCsv.title: Exclude Product Ids
excludeProductIdsCsv.description: Comma-separated product ids the shopper already rejected this chat. Pass any previously recommended primaryProductId the shopper turned down so it is never re-offered.

preferredBeanType.title: Preferred Bean Type
preferredBeanType.description: HARD filter: Single-Origin or Blend. Pass from the shopper's saved/stated beanType. Independent of brew/roast.

preferredBrewStyle.title: Preferred Brew Style
preferredBrewStyle.description: HARD filter: Espresso, Cold Brew, or All-Purpose. Pass when the shopper wants an espresso/cold-brew coffee. Independent of bean type.

preferredFamily.title: Preferred Family
preferredFamily.description: Bias the pick toward this product family, e.g. Single-Origin or Espresso, based on what the shopper asked for.

preferredRoast.title: Preferred Roast
preferredRoast.description: HARD filter: Light, Medium, or Dark. Pass from the shopper's saved/stated roast.

wantsDecaf.title: Wants Decaf
wantsDecaf.description: HARD filter. true = ONLY decaf, false = ONLY regular (no decaf). Leave unset if the shopper has no caffeine preference. Map a saved caffeine of 'regular' -> false, 'decaf' -> true.
